title: Urgent Opening Teacher at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
